releases.label: Cycle 11
releases.summary: Cycle 11 observing season (Oct 2024 - Sep 2025); data flow to the ALMA Science Archive and become public after the standard 12-month proprietary period

releases.label: Cycle 12
releases.summary: Current observing cycle (Oct 2025 - Sep 2026); ALMA has rolling archive releases rather than versioned DRs - Cycle 12 data enter the ALMA Science Archive and become public after the 12-month proprietary period

releases.label: Cycle 13
releases.summary: Observations expected to begin October 2026 for 12 months with 4,300 hours on the 12-m Array and the Morita Array (ACA); Call for Proposals released 2026-03-19, deadline 2026-04-23
